name: VR First Aid Trainer
summary: The CPR module in the VR First Aid Trainer enables learners to practice high-quality cardiopulmonary resuscitation in a realistic virtual hospital environment with step-by-step guidance. It provides real-time feedback on hand placement, compression depth, and rhythm to ensure correct technique. The module helps users develop muscle memory and confidence through repeated practice. It also includes a performance summary to support self-evaluation and skill improvement.
